since_last: 6% of 100 AI names green; Powering AI leads -1.10%; AI bubble risk 50 Neutral.

cards.headline: The tape: broad selling, 6% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX -0.51% · BTC -0.93% · Gold +0.21% · Nasdaq100 -1.62%. 6% of 100 AI names are green — broad selling. Powering AI is doing the heavy lifting at -1.10%.

cards.headline: Powering AI leads, AI Chips & Compute lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is Powering AI at -1.10%; weakest is AI Chips & Compute at -3.18%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: ISRG is the standout at -10.27%
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) -4.13% at $125.7
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is -4.13% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 50 — Neutral
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 50/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
